component.name: Aero
component.summary: A modern audio recorder with real-time visualization

description.p: Aero is a sleek desktop audio recorder built with C++ and Qt6. Record from any microphone in WAV, MP3, or OGG format with real-time waveform and VU meter visualization.

ul.li: Record audio in WAV, MP3, or OGG format
Real-time waveform and VU meter visualization
Select audio input device (external microphones supported)
Recording list with playback, rename, and delete

description.p: Initial release with recording, playback, waveform visualization, and input device selection.
